meta.description: Spreads & Straddles identification drill — 32 cards covering debit spreads, credit spreads, straddles, and strangles

cards.front: You buy 1 TSLA Mar 250 call for 8 and sell 1 TSLA Mar 270 call for 3.
cards.back:
Bull Call Spread (Net Debit)

Buy the lower call, sell the higher call.
cards.memoryAid: Two calls, net debit, bullish.

cards.front: You buy 1 NVDA Apr 130 call for 5 and sell 1 NVDA Apr 145 call for 2.
cards.back:
Bull Call Spread (Net Debit)

Buy the lower call, sell the higher call.
cards.memoryAid: Two calls, net debit, bullish.

cards.memoryAid: Two calls, net debit, bullish.

cards.front: You buy 1 AMD Mar 115 put for 5 and sell 1 AMD Mar 100 put for 1.50.
cards.back:
Bear Put Spread (Net Debit)

Buy the higher put, sell the lower put.
cards.memoryAid: Two puts, net debit, bearish.

cards.back:

cards.memoryAid: Two puts, net debit, bearish.

cards.front: You sell 1 AAPL Mar 220 put for 7 and buy 1 AAPL Mar 205 put for 2.50.
cards.back:
Bull Put Spread (Net Credit)

Sell the higher put, buy the lower put.
cards.memoryAid:
Two puts, net credit, bullish.
Credit = you want the stock to stay up.

cards.front: You sell 1 META Feb 580 put for 14 and buy 1 META Feb 560 put for 6.
cards.back:

Sell the higher put, buy the lower put.
cards.memoryAid:
Two puts, net credit, bullish.
Credit = you want the stock to stay up.

Two calls, net credit, bearish.
Credit = you want the stock to stay down.

cards.front: You buy 1 TSLA Mar 250 call for 14 and buy 1 TSLA Mar 250 put for 11.
cards.back:
Long Straddle (Net Debit)

Buy a call AND a put at the same strike.
cards.memoryAid:
Same strike = straddle. Both bought = long.
You need a big move either way.

cards.front: You buy 1 NVDA Apr 130 call for 8 and buy 1 NVDA Apr 130 put for 6.
cards.back:
Long Straddle (Net Debit)

Buy a call AND a put at the same strike.
cards.memoryAid:
Same strike = straddle. Both bought = long.
You need a big move either way.

cards.back:
Long Straddle (Net Debit)

Buy a call AND a put at the same strike.
cards.memoryAid:
Same strike = straddle. Both bought = long.
You need a big move either way.

cards.front: You buy 1 SPY Mar 580 call for 10 and buy 1 SPY Mar 580 put for 9.
cards.back:
Long Straddle (Net Debit)

Buy a call AND a put at the same strike.
cards.memoryAid:
Same strike = straddle. Both bought = long.
You need a big move either way.

cards.front: You sell 1 META Mar 580 call for 15 and sell 1 META Mar 580 put for 13.
cards.back:
Short Straddle (Net Credit)

Sell a call AND a put at the same strike.
cards.memoryAid:
Same strike = straddle. Both sold = short.
You need the stock to go nowhere.

cards.front: You sell 1 AAPL Apr 220 call for 8 and sell 1 AAPL Apr 220 put for 7.
cards.back:
Short Straddle (Net Credit)

Sell a call AND a put at the same strike.
cards.memoryAid:
Same strike = straddle. Both sold = short.
You need the stock to go nowhere.

cards.front: You sell 1 TSLA Feb 255 call for 16 and sell 1 TSLA Feb 255 put for 12.

Sell a call AND a put at the same strike.
cards.memoryAid:

You need the stock to go nowhere.

cards.back:
Short Straddle (Net Credit)

Sell a call AND a put at the same strike.
cards.memoryAid:
Same strike = straddle. Both sold = short.
You need the stock to go nowhere.

cards.front: You buy 1 AMD Mar 115 call for 3 and buy 1 AMD Mar 105 put for 2.50.
cards.back:
Long Strangle (Net Debit)

Buy a call AND a put at different strikes.
cards.memoryAid:
Different strikes = strangle. Both bought = long.
Cheaper than a straddle, needs an even bigger move.

cards.front: You buy 1 SPY Apr 590 call for 6 and buy 1 SPY Apr 570 put for 5.
cards.back:
Long Strangle (Net Debit)

Buy a call AND a put at different strikes.
cards.memoryAid:
Different strikes = strangle. Both bought = long.
Cheaper than a straddle, needs an even bigger move.

Buy a call AND a put at different strikes.

cards.back:

Sell a call AND a put at different strikes.

Different strikes = strangle. Both sold = short.
More room than a short straddle before you lose money.
